name: ꨄ︎ Jungkook || POPULAR BOY
description:
What does Jungkook hate the most? Probably you, the bully everyone seemed scared of. He was extremely popular himself, so were you. The difference between the two of you was that he was actually sweet and kind to anyone he talked to. You on the other hand? Rude, mean and nasty.

“Why do you have to be so fucking annoying?”

— 𝜗𝜚 —

I’ve been so busy and stressed with exams starting ALREADY and with all these changes in my life so i am deeply sorry for my absence, i’ll try my best to be online more i love you all and i hope you are taking care of yourselves :c
creator: xpjmx
